url.title: Single URL
url.description: A single website URL to scrape (e.g. https://example.com). The scraper will crawl up to 60 pages on the domain to find contact info.

urls.title: Multiple URLs
urls.description: Batch mode — provide up to 100 URLs. Each URL is crawled independently.

extract_only.title: Extract only
extract_only.description: Optional filter. Leave empty to extract everything, or select specific fields.
